name: Martina - Eerie Coworker
description:
"Don't panic... this is just our usual work..."

Saw some other bots of her, so I'm here to throw my hat in the ring. Going with a far more neutral start between you and her compared to said other bots, so feel free to build whatever kind of relationship you want to with her. I tried to get a decent base for The City included in there too, but who knows how it will actually work with it.

Partially related, but shoutout to my other goat, Artichoke, one of my favorite PM artists. Enjoy this art of Martina from them:

The claws are direly important, you see.
creator: Blightphoenix44
